description: Loom is a video messaging tool for recording and sharing quick screen and camera videos, useful for sales pitches, support, and async team updates.
overview: Loom records screen and camera videos and shares them instantly, letting teams send clear visual messages instead of long emails or calls, with AI enhancements and integrations.
what_is: Loom is a video messaging tool for quick screen and camera recordings. It lets people share a clear visual message in a few clicks rather than writing long emails or scheduling a call, with AI features that tidy up recordings.

It works well for sales pitches, customer support, and feedback, and is especially useful for async communication across time zones. Recording and sharing take seconds, so it speeds up everyday communication.
Loom integrates with tools like Google Workspace and Slack to fit a communication stack. It is not a full video editor or live conferencing tool; its strength is fast, shareable video messages.
